evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D25 Mission Report Greece January 2024
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D25 Mission Report Greece January 2024 AT 0109Z, CONDUCTED SLR TAKE OFF FROM LGLR. PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a AT 0509Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 0135Z, WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0635Z, CHECKED IN WITH AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36R XV 19 63 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1504Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2149Z, LANDED AT LGLR. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:40 MISSION HOURS, 08:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 08:27 SIGINT HOURS, 1X SIGINT TASKINGS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490125 OPERATION - Operation: (b)(1)1.4a - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 603rd - Major Command (MAJC

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023 AT 2100Z, TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO AT 1822Z, WAS 7-LINED. DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN

PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a AT 0509Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 0135Z, WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0635Z, CHECKED IN WITH AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36R XV 19 63 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1504Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2149Z, LANDED AT LGLR. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:40 MISSION HOURS, 08:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 08:27 SIGINT HOURS, 1X SIGINT TASKINGS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490125 OPERATION - Operation: (b)(1)1.4a - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 603rd - Major Command (MAJC

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023 AT 2100Z, TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO AT 1822Z, WAS 7-LINED. DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN

DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D25 Mission Report Greece January 2024
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D25 Mission Report Greece January 2024 AT 0109Z, CONDUCTED SLR TAKE OFF FROM LGLR. PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a AT 0509Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 0135Z, WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0635Z, CHECKED IN WITH AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36R XV 19 63 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1504Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2149Z, LANDED AT LGLR. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:40 MISSION HOURS, 08:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 08:27 SIGINT HOURS, 1X SIGINT TASKINGS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490125 OPERATION - Operation: (b)(1)1.4a - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 603rd - Major Command (MAJC

PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a AT 0509Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 0135Z, WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0635Z, CHECKED IN WITH AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36R XV 19 63 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1504Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2149Z, LANDED AT LGLR. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:40 MISSION HOURS, 08:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 08:27 SIGINT HOURS, 1X SIGINT TASKINGS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490125 OPERATION - Operation: (b)(1)1.4a - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 603rd - Major Command (MAJC

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023 AT 2100Z, TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO AT 1822Z, WAS 7-LINED. DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN

PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a AT 0509Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 0135Z, WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0635Z, CHECKED IN WITH AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36R XV 19 63 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1504Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2149Z, LANDED AT LGLR. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:40 MISSION HOURS, 08:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 08:27 SIGINT HOURS, 1X SIGINT TASKINGS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490125 OPERATION - Operation: (b)(1)1.4a - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 603rd - Major Command (MAJC

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023 AT 2100Z, TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO AT 1822Z, WAS 7-LINED. DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN

DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D25 Mission Report Greece January 2024
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D25 Mission Report Greece January 2024 AT 0109Z, CONDUCTED SLR TAKE OFF FROM LGLR. PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a AT 0509Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 0135Z, WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0635Z, CHECKED IN WITH AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36R XV 19 63 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1504Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2149Z, LANDED AT LGLR. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:40 MISSION HOURS, 08:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 08:27 SIGINT HOURS, 1X SIGINT TASKINGS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490125 OPERATION - Operation: (b)(1)1.4a - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 603rd - Major Command (MAJC

PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a AT 0509Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 0135Z, WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0635Z, CHECKED IN WITH AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36R XV 19 63 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1504Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2149Z, LANDED AT LGLR. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:40 MISSION HOURS, 08:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 08:27 SIGINT HOURS, 1X SIGINT TASKINGS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490125 OPERATION - Operation: (b)(1)1.4a - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 603rd - Major Command (MAJC

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023 AT 2100Z, TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO AT 1822Z, WAS 7-LINED. DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN

PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a AT 0509Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 0135Z, WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0635Z, CHECKED IN WITH AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36R XV 19 63 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1504Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2149Z, LANDED AT LGLR. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:40 MISSION HOURS, 08:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 08:27 SIGINT HOURS, 1X SIGINT TASKINGS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490125 OPERATION - Operation: (b)(1)1.4a - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 603rd - Major Command (MAJC

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023 AT 2100Z, TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO AT 1822Z, WAS 7-LINED. DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN
